mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS declines by > 0.5% over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in unemployment rate below 4% indicates tight labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE falls below 4.0 for 2 consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP and housing starts signals strong aggregate demand, creating positive S&P 500 momentum over 60 trading days through improved corporate revenue expectations.
failure_condition: SPX fails to outperform baseline by 2% in 60d returns when both GDPC1 and HOUST show positive 3-month growth.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production above 100 indicates rising manufacturing activity, generating positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days through improved earnings visibility.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 40% of instances where INDPRO exceeds 100 for 2 consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation (CPIAUCSL > 310) combined with rising Fed funds rates creates a negative real rate environment, depressing S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 310 and FEDFUNDS > 4.5.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 150k signals robust employment expansion, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days through consumer spending optimism.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 158638 for 2 consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer spending (RSAFS) indicates strong private demand, generating positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days through improved corporate profit outlooks.
failure_condition: SPX fails to outperform baseline by 3% in 60d returns when RSAFS shows positive 3-month growth.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and retail sales (RSAFS) signals robust demand conditions, creating positive S&P 500 momentum over 20 trading days through improved earnings visibility.
failure_condition: SPX fails to outperform baseline by 2% in 20d returns when both GDPC1 and RSAFS show positive 3-month growth.
